title: Struct Plus
description: Struct plus is a server-side fabric mod that adds some new Structures to Minecraft.  Those structures try to not be too over the top and fit with the style of the vanilla game.
body:
# Struct Plus

Struct plus is a server-side fabric mod that adds some new Structures to Minecraft.

Those structures try to not be too over the top and fit with the style of the vanilla game.



Here is one of the structures. The drowned dungeon

![Drowned Dungeon](https://i.imgur.com/sKmTGE8.png)
